top3.sql:
SELECT 
    MAX(age) - MIN(age) AS age_gap
FROM (
    SELECT 
        strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) - 
        (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) AS age
    FROM Patient p
    JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
    WHERE l.TG = 'normal'
);

SELECT 
    MAX(CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) AS INTEGER)) - 
    MIN(CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) AS INTEGER)) AS age_gap
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.TG = 'normal';

SELECT 
    MAX(age) - MIN(age) AS age_gap
FROM (
    SELECT 
        strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) - 
        (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) AS age
    FROM Patient p
    JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
    WHERE l.TG = 'normal'
);

SELECT 
    MAX(CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) AS INTEGER)) - 
    MIN(CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) AS INTEGER)) AS age_gap
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.TG = 'normal';

SELECT 
    MAX(strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) - 
        (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday))) - 
    MIN(strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) - 
        (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday))) AS age_gap
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.TG = 'normal';

SELECT 
    MAX(age) - MIN(age) AS age_gap
FROM (
    SELECT 
        strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) - 
        (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) AS age
    FROM Patient p
    JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
    WHERE l.TG = 'normal'
);

SELECT 
    MAX(age) - MIN(age) AS age_gap
FROM (
    SELECT 
        p.ID,
        CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) AS INTEGER) - 
        (CASE WHEN strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS age
    FROM Patient p
    JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
    WHERE l.TG = 'normal'
);

SELECT 
    MAX(CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) AS INTEGER)) - 
    MIN(CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) AS INTEGER)) AS age_gap
FROM Patient p
WHERE p.ID IN (
    SELECT l.ID 
    FROM Laboratory l 
    WHERE l.TG = 'normal'
);

final.sql:
SELECT 
    MAX(age) - MIN(age) AS age_gap
FROM (
    SELECT 
        strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) - 
        (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) AS age
    FROM Patient p
    JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
    WHERE l.TG = 'normal'
);
